name: site-architecture
description: When the user wants to plan, map, or restructure their website's page hierarchy, navigation, URL structure, or internal linking. Also use when the user mentions "sitemap," "site map," "visual sitemap," "site structure," "page hierarchy," "information architecture," "IA," "navigation design," "URL structure," "breadcrumbs," "internal linking strategy," "website planning," "what pages do I need," "how should I organize my site," or "site navigation." Use this whenever someone is planning what page
author: coreyhaines31
summary_zh: 帮你规划和梳理网站的页面层级、导航及内链结构，适合在建站前规划需要哪些页面，或重构现有网站信息架构时使用。
